new_terms.context: Kimi 2.5 from Moonshot AI is a perfect showcase of the models to come.
PARL or Parallel Agent Reinforcement Learning is a sign of what is to come.
Every incremental model this year is going to heavily focus more on agent orchestration as well as performance.
Sonnet 5 for example is clearly oriented towards agent swarms akin to how PARL works at Kimi 2.5.
Anthropic and Gemini didn’t fully understand or push the RL and chain-of-thought inflection initially
Agent orchestration is the new CoT.
Anthropic is limited by FLOPs and MWs, not in terms of capability
going to fund their expansion into the GW game in a big way.
